issue_title: Don't use hard-coded localhost for websocket
issue_body_preview:
## Describe the bug

localhost is hard-coded here: https://github.com/nvh95/jest-preview/blob/v0.3.1/cli/server/ws-client.js#L4

This makes remote development a little more finicky. I'm running jest-preview in a remote server, and want to use my laptop's browser to visit the jest preview dashboa
test_description_zh: 在远程开发环境中启动 jest-preview 服务端，然后在本地浏览器中通过远程服务器的 IP 地址或主机名（非 localhost）访问 jest-preview 预览面板页面，观察 WebSocket 连接是否能正常建立，页面是否能实时更新预览内容。
expected_result_zh: 通过非 localhost 地址访问 jest-preview 预览面板时，WebSocket 连接能正常建立（不会因硬编码 localhost 导致连接失败），页面能正常加载并实时显示测试预览内容的更新。
